ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "century_id" INTEGER /* ID of the century the data was collected in */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature value */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature value */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature value */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation value */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_century_id FOREIGN KEY ("century_id") REFERENCES centuries ("century_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centuries" (
  "century_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each century */,
  "century_name" TEXT /* Name of the century (e.g., 19th, 20th) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the century */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the century */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("century_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., government agency, research institution) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the project */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being exported */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher exporting the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_options" TEXT /* Options used for exporting the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being analyzed */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used for analysis */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "visualization" TEXT /* Visualization data */,
  "visualization_options" TEXT /* Options used for visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used to train the model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used for the model */,
  "testing_data" TEXT /* Testing data used for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was evaluated */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_data" TEXT /* Data used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being evaluated */,
  "quality_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality was evaluated */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Type of quality metric (e.g., completeness, accuracy) */,
  "quality_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "quality_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the quality evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_lineage" (
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineage entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being tracked */,
  "source_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source data */,
  "transformation" TEXT /* Description of the transformation applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_source_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)
